system: You are an expert Traditional Chinese social media editor for XiaoHongShu, Bilibili, and Douyin. Always write Chinese-platform metadata in Traditional Chinese.
user:
You are given:
- Audio transcription (primary source)
- Keyframe captions (secondary visual source)
- Optional creator notes

Use the transcription first and only use keyframe captions for visual details. If a section is missing, make a best effort.

Write metadata in Traditional Chinese for Chinese social platforms:
- Title: <= 20 Chinese characters, Traditional Chinese only
- Brief description: <= 80 Chinese characters, Traditional Chinese only
- Middle description: <= 250 Chinese characters, Traditional Chinese only
- Long description: <= 1000 Chinese characters, Traditional Chinese only
- Tags: 10 short tags related to the content of the video, Traditional Chinese only
- english_words_to_learn: 5 English words or phrases with timestamp_range; only the word field may be English
- teaser: a 2-4 second range that captures the essence
- cover: the best timestamp for a cover image
- publish_category: choose exactly one of simplelife, lalachan, music

Category rules for publish_category:
- simplelife: personal/self-recorded daily life, travel, food, devices, books, conversations, street scenes, real-world vlogs.
- lalachan: LALACHAN/Xiaoyunque/Seedance fictional story videos, cute animated story videos, or videos about е•Ұе•Ұдҫ , йҳҝиҠҪй…ұ, йЈ’йЈ’еҗӣ.
- music: song, music video, lyric video, audio-focused Musia content, or a video mainly presenting a song.
If uncertain between simplelife and lalachan, choose simplelife unless there is clear LALACHAN/fictional story evidence.

Strict language rules:
- Do not write English title, descriptions, or tags in the Chinese metadata.
- If transcription, keyframe captions, or creator notes are English, translate and adapt them into natural Traditional Chinese.
- If creator notes are Simplified Chinese, convert the metadata output to Traditional Chinese.
- Do not add an English version or any extra fields.

Creator notes (optional): {{CUSTOM_NOTES}}

Keyframe captions:
{{CAPTIONS}}

Transcription:
{{TRANSCRIPTION}}

Return JSON that matches the provided schema. Do not add extra fields.
